DESCRIPTION: Embedded Analytics: In-app visualizations with Hybrid Tables for operational workloads. Best practices: Hybrid Tables with index-based reads and row locking, CTAS for bulk loading empty tables, X-Small Multi-Cluster warehouse with Standard scaling for operational queries, separate warehouse sized for BI working set, Streamlit for custom apps.
